title: Decoder Artifacts
description: Four independent artifact studies that test invented glyph systems in different worldbuilding formats without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Independent single-image studies: each image invents a separate symbol culture and presents it as a finished museum, field-guide, or game-art artifact rather than a plain alphabet chart.

en.title: Decoder Artifacts
en.description: Four independent artifact studies that test invented glyph systems in different worldbuilding formats without reference dependencies.

zh-CN.title: 解码文物
zh-CN.description: 四张独立单图，以博物馆、田野图鉴和游戏美术形式测试不同虚构符号系统。
